description: Verify Japanese companies, invoice-issuer registrations and addresses against government open data.
name: com.hojincheck/hojincheck

headers.description: API key as a Bearer token, e.g. 'Bearer hjc_live_...'. Get a free key at https://hojincheck.com/signup (100 requests/day). X-Api-Key is also accepted.
headers.name: Authorization

title: HojinCheck — Japanese corporate verification API (hojin = 法人/corporate entity)
